summary: Verified bug fix: Skills constellation connecting lines are now visible in DARK mode. Sampled canvas via getImageData in both themes. LIGHT: 7099 dark pixels (avg<80) on white background; DARK: 6583 bright pixels (avg>180, sampled colors rgb(255,255,255)) on near-black background. Skill cards 0-9 all render. Theme toggle correctly toggles 'dark' class on <html>. No console errors on load, toggle, or mouse move.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The <canvas> inside SkillsGraph does not carry the promised data-testid='skills-particle-canvas' attribute; only its wrapper has data-testid='skills-graph'. Consider adding data-testid='skills-particle-canvas' to the <canvas> element itself so external test hooks work as documented.
Minor perf: A Canvas2D 'willReadFrequently' warning appears (triggered by test getImageData reads, not app code). App itself is fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix (dark-mode constellation lines) verified end-to-end via canvas pixel sampling. Only tiny nit: canvas element lacks data-testid='skills-particle-canvas' (only wrapper has skills-graph). Rest of portfolio validated in earlier iterations.
rca of the issue: Previously SkillsGraph read --fg CSS variable which was not correctly updated for dark mode; fix reads getComputedStyle(document.body).color each frame. Verified: LIGHT lines drawn as rgb(0,0,0,alpha), DARK lines drawn as rgb(255,255,255,alpha).
